elements.name: Scenario 3 - Early Bird tier not yet started (validFrom in future -> isAvailable false)

steps.name: def tag = UUID.randomUUID() + ''
comments: # Note: Backend validates validFrom/validUntil must be in the FUTURE at creation time.
# A tier with validFrom in the future (not yet started) shows isAvailable=false.
# This scenario verifies the EB tier availability logic without requiring past-dated creation.

name: api/event-availability-visibility/event-availability-visibility.feature
description:
Ticketing MVP - Event Availability Visibility
As a buyer
  I want to view event availability and tier status
  So that I can see which tiers are available for purchase
